title: Quantum Walks on Graphs
description: Master the theory and implementation of quantum walks on graphs, including both discrete-time and continuous-time quantum walks. Learn how quantum walks provide speedups for graph exploration and form the basis for many quantum algorithms.
learningObjectives: Distinguish between discrete-time and continuous-time quantum walks
Implement quantum walks on various graph structures
Analyze the mixing time and hitting time of quantum walks
Compare quantum walk spreading with classical random walks
Apply quantum walks to search problems on graphs
Understand the role of interference in quantum walk speedups
